description: Composition:Dark grey round neck t-shirt made of  100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitLet loose that mischievous side of you and spread the grin in this dark grey cotton tee from mr. men. Its bold graphic on the chest is in line with today's trend. Team it up with jeans or cargoes for casual outings and when hanging out with friends with this cool avataar.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
